sections.label: Verse 1
lines: My heart wakes up like morning light
Breaking through a battle night
No crown upon my fragile head
Still You heard the words I said
They build their towers to the sky
Counting power, measuring pride
But I was trembling on my knees
Learning strength is dependency

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: The world exalts the iron fist
But You lean close to brokenness
The proud parade in armour bright
But You are found in surrender’s white

sections.label: Chorus
lines: You break the bow of the mighty
You lift the low from the dust
You crown the quiet with mercy
You turn the strong into trust
You raise the poor from the ashes
Seat them where kings would rise
The throne belongs to the humble
And the hungry inherit the skies

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: I’ve seen the full go begging bread
And empty hands by grace be fed
I’ve watched the loudest voices fall
While whispers shook the marble halls
No one wins by standing tall
If heaven bends to hear the small
The barren sings, the weary stand
Life is written in scarred hands

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: The scales tilt toward the least of these
The last become the legacy
The shattered bones are wrapped in light
And weakness learns its right to fight

sections.label: Chorus
lines: You break the bow of the mighty
You lift the low from the dust
You crown the quiet with mercy
You turn the strong into trust
You raise the poor from the ashes
Seat them where kings would rise
The throne belongs to the humble
And the hungry inherit the skies

sections.label: Bridge
lines: No sword can hold what You decree
No throne can steal eternity
The pillars of the earth are Yours
You set the weak before the war
Adversaries fade like flame
Power trembles at Your name
Not by might and not by fame
But by surrender we are changed

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: You break the bow of the mighty
You lift the low from the dust
You crown the quiet with mercy
You turn the strong into trust
You raise the poor from the ashes
Seat them where kings would rise
The throne belongs to the humble
And the hungry inherit the skies
Yes, the hungry inherit the skies
